job_title: Software Engineer III, Full Stack, Commerce
job_nlp_title: Software Engineer III, Full Stack, Commerce
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: Java, C++, JavaScript, TypeScript, Performance analysis
skill_match_scores: Java:1.0, C++:0.0, JavaScript:0.5, TypeScript:1.0, Performance analysis:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience, 2 years of experience programming in Java or C++, 2 years of experience programming in JavaScript or TypeScript
preferred_quals: Master's degree or PhD in Computer Science or related technical field, 2 years of experience with performance, large scale systems data analysis, visualization tools or debugging, 2 years of experience with data structures or algorithms in either an academic or industry setting, Experience developing accessible technologies, Proficiency in code and system health, diagnosis and resolution, and software test engineering
core_responsibilities: Write product or system development code, Participate in, or lead design reviews with peers and stakeholders to decide amongst available technologies, Review code developed by other developers and provide feedback to ensure best practices (e.g., style guidelines, checking code in, accuracy, testability, and efficiency), Contribute to existing documentation or educational content and adapt content based on product/program updates and user feedback, Triage product or system issues and debug/track/resolve by analyzing the sources of issues and the impact on hardware, network, or service operations and quality
job_summary: Google is a leading technology company that develops next-generation technologies for billions of users. They are seeking a Software Engineer III to work on critical projects within the Commerce team, focusing on building user experiences that enhance the shopping journey and support the commerce ecosystem.
